reasoning: Dominant hues are saturated sky-blue/teal and warm gold-amber — both well-represented in the Echoes palette swatch. The complementary teal+gold pairing is internally harmonious and reads bright, warm, and adventurous, matching the target mood. Cream/white dashes and star highlights add lightness without going cold or sterile. Small blue accent squares around the outer ring reinforce the sky-blue key. The only mild concern is the outline/silhouette pixels: at pixel level they appear very dark and could be near-neutral-grey rather than a colored dark (deep teal or warm brown); if pure black, that violates the 'shadows are colored darks' rule, but at normal viewing scale the warm gold and teal so dominate that any outline coldness is negligible. Saturation is healthy across all main tones. Palette compatibility is high. No muddy desaturated, neon, cold corporate, or goth-black areas observed in the button asset itself.
